mission: Determine whether the current physical puncture sector already contains a canonical distinguished defect capable of carrying the compensator charge q.

theorem_1_physical_surface_sector_is_unm.statement: The standard physical surface Hilbert space is built from finite puncture sets V and nonzero labels a_i in Z_k with sum_i a_i = 0, but it contains no theorem-grade extra datum selecting one puncture as physically distinguished. The basis is puncture-symmetric apart from the chosen finite set and its charge labels.

formulas.physical_basis: states labelled by (V, a) with a_i in Z_k \ {0}, sum_i a_i = 0
formulas.no_extra_marker: no derived puncture label p_* or distinguished subset V_* is present

theorem_2_tracial_state_carries_no_selec.statement: On the macroscopic area shell, the natural ABCK state is tracial. A tracial state carries no theorem-grade preference for one puncture over another. Therefore the current state data cannot supply the missing marked defect needed to realize the compensator charge q.

theorem_3_exact_future_defect_target.statement: Combining the compensator-charge reduction with the absence of any current marked puncture theorem, a future non-neutral surface extension is not just 'some charged sector'. It is exactly a marked compensator defect datum (p_*, q), or an equivalent open edge-mode carrier with charge q.

formulas.equivalent_edge_mode: open edge-mode carrier with compensator charge q
formulas.current_stack_value: no derived p_*, no derived edge mode, q = 0

imports.compensator_target: Any positive non-neutral Paper 35 surface extension is now reduced to one exact datum: a compensator charge q in Z_k \ {0}. On the current compact closed-sphere stack, that sector is absent. So future work should target an explicit compensator defect / edge-mode theorem rather than a vague non-neutral surface sector.

final_boundary.safe_statement: The current physical puncture sector contains no hidden marked defect. Any positive future compensator route is reduced to one exact new object: a distinguished defect or edge mode carrying charge q in Z_k \ {0}.
